title: Comms anti-pattern verifier return (Phase 4)
description: Validates the anti-pattern verifier panel's return (_core/primitives/comms-panels.md Panel 1; SPEC-workflow-phases-2-5.md § 4c). One read-only critic reads the post-redaction comms draft plus the engagement's anti-pattern list and returns every banned-phrase match. FLAG-only: the critic reports violations; it never authors replacement text and never self-reports blocking. The orchestrator hard-blocks the write deterministically when violations[] is non-empty (block_write = len(violations) > 0) — blocking is never an agent field. additionalProperties:false at every level so an extra key (notably replacement_text or blocking) fails structurally rather than slipping through.

violations.description: Every banned-phrase match found in the draft. Empty array means a clean draft — report [], never omit the property. A non-empty array hard-blocks the write (orchestrator-computed).

phrase.description: The banned phrase as it appears in the draft.

location.description: Where in the draft the phrase appears, e.g. 'Section 2, ¶3'.

source_note.description: Why this phrase is banned (e.g. 'CHRO explicit rejection FY25'). For the operator's surface, not a fix instruction.
